Idioma.AYUDA_SeleccionDeArchivo: • Selection of file: Select the file that desires to import pressuring the button of Browse
Idioma.AYUDA_Importacion: • Importing: Once it selected the file pressure the button of Importing
Idioma.AYUDA_ResumenDeImportacion:
• Summary of Importing: Al to import the file will be shown information related to the importing.

    • >
Idioma.AYUDA_Revision: • Revision: Once it imported the file, can be revised and to confirm its generation al to give click in Returning.
Idioma.AYUDA_ElArchivoDebeSerUnArchivoPlanoConE:
The file should be a flat file with the following format:

Separator of columns: (Eat)
End of line: (chr(13))
